description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a dark gray exterior accented by white window frames and railings. The front features a double garage with paneled doors, a main entryway, and large windows that allow ample natural light into the living spaces. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony with white railings, accessible from the second floor, and a smaller deck area on the ground level. The interior layout is open, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple bedrooms and bathrooms. The house is constructed primarily from wood and concrete, with glass used extensively for windows and doors. Minimalist landscaping and clean lines contribute to its contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray siding, large windows, and a double garage. Features include a spacious balcony, open-plan interior, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the double garage, main entryway, and large windows with white frames.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat roof, asymmetrical window placement, and a small protruding room.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the spacious balcony with white railings and a deck area below.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open-plan living and dining areas with large windows and a secondary entry.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and grouped panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, minimal overhang, and direct access from the driveway; no porch or decorative columns.
